name: Vietnam Flavors Experience & Beach Relax 11 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Halong Bay - Da Nang - Hoi An - Ho Chi Minh City - Phu Quoc
highlights: Embark on a walking food tour through Hanoi's bustling streets and hidden alleys.
Immerse yourself in the flavors of central Vietnam with a cooking class in Hoi An.
Relax and unwind on a luxury cruise through the breathtaking landscapes of Halong Bay.
Have ample time to relax on pristine beaches and swim in crystal-clear waters of Phu Quoc.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
Morning

Arrive at Noi Bai International Airport, where our guide will greet you and transfer you to your hotel in Hanoi. After check-in, take some time to rest or explore the city at your own pace - wander the Old Quarter, try local snacks, or enjoy a relaxing stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake. NOTE: Hotel check-in time is 14:00. For guests who want to check in earlier, there will be a surcharge.

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour by Mortobike
itinerary.description:
Morning/Afternoon (depending on the tour availability)

08:00: After breakfast, meet our tour guide at the hotel to start the Hanoi City Tour and explore its long-lasting culture on a motorcycle. Travel to the historical Long Bien Bridge, a must-see destination. Here, you can take your time enjoying the view and shooting good pictures. Cross the iconic Chuong Duong Bridge, which is remarkable for being the first central bridge to be designed and constructed entirely by Vietnamese workers. Continue to Hanoi Opera House, a signature project built by the French government in the early years of th...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay - Overnight on Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast and pack your luggage. Our driver will pick you up and head to Ha Long Bay with a 2-day cruise tour around a World Heritage of outstanding natural beauty. 11:30 - 12:00: Arrive at the pier. The boat crew will warmly welcome you on board with a welcome drink. Enjoy a seafood feast during lunch while admiring thousands of limestone islands that rise from crystal-clear water

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi - Fly to Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Practice Tai-chi lessons in the early morning and witness the amazing sunrise. Then, enjoy your breakfast with tea and desserts. The cruise takes you further into the bay to explore more caves for the last sightseeing tour. You may go kayaking or swimming, too. Back to the main dock for transferring to Hanoi

itinerary.title: Hoi An Cooking Class and Street Food Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:00: Your guide and driver will pick you up at your hotel by car or minivan. Now it’s time to have a trip to explore the countryside of Hoi An. Stop for a visit at a local market along the way. Here, you can take a look at Hoi An’s vibrant and colorful lifestyle of the local people. 09:00: Take a round bamboo boat to the cooking school at Cam Thanh fishing village where you can witness local fishermen working as we paddle into the green coconut forest waterways to catch purple crabs, and take photos

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Da Nang - Fly to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at the hotel and enjoy your remaining time in the beautiful Hoi An. Then, transfer to Da Nang Airport to take a flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Afternoon

Land at Tan Son Nhat International Airport, where our driver will be waiting to transfer you to the hotel in the city center. Check-in and be free to explore the city on your own, which is famous for its bustling and vibrant nightlife.

itinerary.title: Full day Cooking Class with Ho Chi Minh City tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

07:30: Start your tour at your hotel and arrive at HCM Agricultural Villages for a fun farming tour. 08:30: Visit the agricultural villages and walk around to explore the place. Here, you can take a look at the various areas of cow, buffalo, fish, prawn, chicken, and duck. Head to the big herbs, spices, vegetables, and mushroom areas in the garden and become a real Vietnamese farmer in a traditional hat called “non la” and pick some ingredients for the next culinary class. Participated in a Cooking Challenge at 10:00

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Phu Quoc
itinerary.description:
Morning

Free at leisure to explore the city until the driver takes you to the airport to fly to Phu Quoc. Afternoon

After arriving at Phu Quoc airport, you will be transferred to the hotel for check-in and rest. You will have time for yourself for the rest of the day. Take this chance to go to the gorgeous beaches of this pearl island.

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc - Fly back to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Have breakfast at the hotel’s restaurant. Enjoy your last day in Phu Quoc. Prepare your belongings. Check out the hotel, heading to the airport back to Ho Chi Minh City. The tour ends here

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
4 domestic flights Hanoi – Da Nang and Danang – Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh- Phu Quoc, Phu Quoc- Ho Chi Minh
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
